steps.title: Use the attribution clue
steps.content: The unchanged microorganism community composition allowed the researchers to attribute faster nutrient cycling to increased activity. That means the finding removed a competing explanation.

steps.title: Compare the choices
steps.content: Choice A treats the composition finding as evidence for the acceleration itself; Choice B shifts to higher elevations; Choice D says activity varied by community makeup. Choice C states that an alternative explanation was ruled out. The answer is C.
